name: IdsEdwEvtParGrpDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_SK, T1.GRP_ID, T1.SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_ACTV_IN, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_EFF_DT_SK, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_TERM_DT_SK, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_COLOR_KEY_DESC, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_NM, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_CELL_PHN_NO, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_WORK_PHN_NO, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T1.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM (SELECT EPG.EVT_PAR_GRP_SK, EPG.GRP_ID, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'')))='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE CD.TRGT_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, EPG.GRP_ACTV_IN AS EVT_PAR_GRP_ACTV_IN, EPG.EFF_DT_SK AS EVT_PAR_GRP_EFF_DT_SK, EPG.TERM_DT_SK AS EVT_PAR_GRP_TERM_DT_SK, EPG.GRP_COLOR_KEY_DESC AS EVT_PAR_GRP_COLOR_KEY_DESC, EPG.GRP_CNTCT_NM AS EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_NM, EPG.GRP_CNTCT_CELL_PHN_NO AS EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_CELL_PHN_NO, EPG.GRP_CNTCT_WORK_PHN_NO AS EVT_PAR_GRP_CNTCT_WORK_PHN_NO, EPG.LAST_UPDT_DTM AS EVT_PAR_GRP_LAST_UPDT_DTM, EPG.LAST_UPDT_USER_ID AS EVT_PAR_GRP_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, EPG.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.EVT_PAR_GRP EPG LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON EPG.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD.CD_MPPNG_SK) T1 WHERE T1.EVT_PAR_GRP_SK NOT IN (0,1) UNION ALL SELECT 0,'UNK','UNK','1753-01-01','1753-01-01','N','1753-01-01','1753-01-01','','UNK','','','1753-01-01 00:00:00.000','UNK',100,100,100 UNION ALL SELECT 1,'NA','NA','1753-01-01','1753-01-01','N','1753-01-01','1753-01-01','','NA','','','1753-01-01 00:00:00.000','NA',100,100,100

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwEvtParGrpDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table EVT_PAR_GRP
Write EVT_PAR_GRP_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
